item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-org-review-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the requested fourth review point, explicitly identifies the sequence of three prior local review-point patches followed by an N+1 request, reframes the issue as a repeated escalation-flow failure, moves upstream to shared evidence and ownership conditions, and proposes consolidation/deletion/replacement via unified intake validation and assignment rules. It only allows a temporary one-day stopgap with expiry, so it does not exhibit the fail signal of directly adding another local review point."}
